lines.raw: Who is Percy Buttons? | 谁是珀西·巴顿斯？

lines.english: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.
lines.chinese: 我刚搬到桥街的一所房子里。
lines.raw: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street. | 我刚搬到桥街的一所房子里。

lines.english: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.
lines.chinese: 昨天一个乞丐敲我的门。
lines.raw: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door. | 昨天一个乞丐敲我的门。

lines.english: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
lines.chinese: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
lines.raw: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer. | 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
In return for this, | 作为回报，

lines.english: the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.
lines.raw: the beggar stood on his head and sang songs. | 乞丐倒立着唱歌。
I gave him a meal. | 我给了他一顿饭。

lines.english: He ate the food and drank the beer.
lines.raw: He ate the food and drank the beer. | 他吃了食物，喝了啤酒。

lines.english: Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away.
lines.chinese: 然后他把一块奶酪放进口袋里，走了。
lines.raw: Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away. | 然后他把一块奶酪放进口袋里，走了。

lines.english: Later a neighbour told me about him.
lines.chinese: 后来一位邻居告诉我关于他的事。
lines.raw: Later a neighbour told me about him. | 后来一位邻居告诉我关于他的事。
Everybody knows him. | 每个人都认识他。

lines.chinese: 他的名字叫珀西·巴顿斯。
lines.raw: His name is Percy Buttons. | 他的名字叫珀西·巴顿斯。

lines.english: He calls at every house in the street once a month
lines.chinese: 他每个月到街上的每家每户拜访一次
lines.raw: He calls at every house in the street once a month | 他每个月到街上的每家每户拜访一次

lines.english: and always asks for a meal and a glass of beer.
lines.chinese: 并且总是要求一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
lines.raw: and always asks for a meal and a glass of beer. | 并且总是要求一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
